content.en:
"You are the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ziye Tian?"

A young man appeared in front of Ye Tian, this person was covered in scales, and a bright star horn, coupled with the rich chaotic life breath on the other party's body, Ye Tian couldn't recognize the other party!

It was clear that this man was the true ruler of the Starhorn clan.

"I'm Ye Tian, you are ......"

Ye Tian asked.

Of course, he knew the identity of the person in front of him, because he had just checked it with his copying talent, and he was the Tuolong of the Starhorn Clan, and he should also be one of the geniuses who had become famous recently.

"Starhorn Clan, Tuolong!"

Tuolong's face was a little ugly, and he said coldly.

He was the first day of the Starhorn Clan, and he was now a great player in the battlefield ruins, Ye Tian actually said that he didn't know him.

"Tuolong, I don't know what you're looking for me?"

Ye Tian wondered.

"Sparring!" Tuo Long said: "Other True Monarchs say that you are very strong, and you also killed the Dao Ancestor incarnation, although I don't believe it, but you can become the first on the True Monarch List, and your strength is definitely not weak!"

For the True Monarch List, Tuolong also knows that it is very fair, but the True Monarch List does not represent everything, a person's combat power includes many aspects, such as his genius as a star horn clan, there are too many secret techniques and hole cards, and he doesn't think that the True Monarch List can explain anything at all.

"I don't have time to fight!"

Ye Tian refused.

He didn't do any good at all to fight with Tuolong, and if he hit Tuolong hard, the Starhorn clan would come to trouble him again, and the conflict would continue to escalate.

If he had been allowed to lose on purpose, he would not have done so.

"What, you don't want to fight?"

Tuolong was dumbfounded.

Their Starhorn clan is the most belligerent, and they will participate in all competitions, and they have never refused.

But now, Ye Tian actually refused to discuss with him, which simply broke his cognition.

"You coward, you refuse to fight!"

Tuolong said disdainfully.

"Hey, it's no good for me to learn from you, why should I learn from you, and I'm here to find opportunities, not to fight!" Ye Tian said.

"Benefits?" Tuolong's heart moved, and he said, "If you win me, I promise to give you a Dao weapon!"

"Dao weapon?" Ye Tian sneered, if it was before, the value of a Dao weapon was indeed very high, and it was even enough to cause Dao Ancestor to fight, but now Dao weapon is really nothing, and he doesn't care at all.

"I have too many Dao weapons, I don't lack Dao weapons!"

Ye Tian didn't care about Dao.

Only then did Tuolong understand that the current value was different from the previous value, and a strong person like Ye Tian did not lack Dao weapons at all, and it was estimated that there was no shortage of inheritance and resources.

"Well, if you win, I'll give you a seed of reincarnation, how about it?"

Tuolong Road.

"Reincarnation seed, are you sure?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The reincarnation seed is not an ordinary treasure, the previous value is enough to be equivalent to a Dao weapon, but in today's era of Dao weapons, a Dao weapon will definitely not be able to exchange for a reincarnation seed, and even dozens of Dao weapons will not be able to exchange for a reincarnation seed.

The reincarnation seed is a kind of treasure that can make people reincarnate and recultivate, for example, if the foundation of the true monarch is insufficient, if you want to rebuild, you can refine the reincarnation seed and rebuild it in another life.

However, the reincarnation seed has a restriction, that is, it is impossible to confirm the talent after reincarnation, and it is possible to reincarnate into an ordinary person with average talent, even if there is a strong person who finds the reincarnated body and then improves his talent, but some potential talents are difficult to improve fundamentally.

For example, basic comprehension, although this aspect can also be improved, there is a limit, such as combat talent, which is sometimes an instinct or potential.

Another example is will, hidden potential, and so on.

But even so, the reincarnation seed is extremely rare, and it was purchased by the Dao Ancestors almost as soon as it was born.

Ye Tian had heard of reincarnation seeds before, but he couldn't buy them, and there were no reincarnation seeds in the Void Heaven vein.

"Okay, I promise!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He needs the reincarnation seed very much, because his wife Xiao Yue's foundation is too poor, but he couldn't help it at the beginning, although he gave his wife talents at the beginning, but these acquired talents are difficult to really change her basic understanding, and it is difficult to improve her will and potential.

In addition, the resources were not enough at the beginning, Xiao Yue did not accumulate at the level of the god general, and he did not take the road of detachment at the beginning.

Therefore, Xiao Yue's future is at most a weaker True Ancestor, but there is not the slightest hope for the Dao Ancestor Path.

And the seed of reincarnation is a hope to change his wife, and he wants it very much.

"Okay, then let's go over there and have a fight!"

Tuolong Road.

Rushing!

Ye Tian and Tuolong flew away, and some True Monarchs and Dao Ancestor incarnations were also more curious, and they all went to observe this battle with their divine senses.

In the battle with Tuolong, Ye Tian did not use the Void Shadow of the Splitting Heaven Divine Pillar, otherwise he could easily kill Tuolong with one blow.

But even if he didn't use the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar Void Heaven, Ye Tian's strength was extremely strong.

In the face of Ye Tian, the legendary demon Tianjiao, Tuolong was careless, and directly turned into the ontology-Star Horn Beast.

Roar!!!!

The huge star-horned beast exuded a terrifying aura, its huge mouth opened, and a terrifying light of destruction killed Ye Tian.

This is a powerful move of the Origin - the light of star extinguishment!

However, Ye Tian cast the Blood River True Body, and with a blow to the sky, he casually shattered Tuolong's attack, and the void shook this void, affecting Tuolong, directly shaking it to the point that his body was cracked.

Then.

Ye Tian unleashed the Yin and Yang Pole Knife and slashed at Tuolong with one blow.

Burst!

Tuolong kept coughing up blood, like a river of blood falling from the sky.

"Impossible!"

Tuolong was shocked.

One by one, his life-saving objects were activated, and even the astonishing top-notch defensive half-way weapon could not withstand Ye Tian's attack, and was directly pierced.

The strength of the two sides is not at the same level at all, as if they are different!

"Do you throw in the towel?"

Ye Tian asked.

Tuolong didn't want to know him, but the injuries broke out layer by layer, and he didn't have the strength to fight anymore at all.

"Throw in the towel!"

Tuolong said helplessly.

Immediately, he threw Ye Tian a box and left here with the support of the two half-step True Ancestors.

And the battle between Ye Tian and Tuolong also made people see Ye Tian's strength, and the true monarchs of the Forbidden Hall and Dao Mountain saw Ye Tian's terrifying strength, and the original intention of challenging Ye Tian immediately dissipated.

That's when it happened.

The Dao Ancestor avatars all launched an attack on the Sunset Sect's headquarters ruins, and a large number of other True Monarchs also poured into the Sunset Sect.
